titleStmt.title: SII 15.272: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 272. (B.K. No. 239 of 1927-28.) HAVĒLI, BAGALKOT TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of Māruti temple.
This is dated Śaka 1744 and San 1232. The Muslim reckoning might be Sūr-san. The date may be equated to 1822 A.D.

It states that Appurāya who was the Subhēdāra of Bāgaḍikōti under the Kumpaṇi Sarakāra, i.e., East India Company, rehabilitated the village of Havēli lying waste for many years, renamed it as Gōpālapura, constructed the temples of Hanumān and Śiva and made provision for worship and offerings therein. The epigraph is written in Nāgarī characters and Sanskrit language.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. śrīrāmacaṁdra prasanna .
svasti śrī nṛpaśālivāhana śāke
vedābdhisaptāvanīgaṇyebda sitava kariṁna
bhūpālarghyadeśe samaḥ . śrīmadbāgaḍikoṭisa
tpuravarādhīśopyarāyāhvayo jīrṇotdhāramadhād ha
rīśakṛpayā gopālapuryāḥ Aho . 1 . yastvāpaṁcaśatā
bdameva patito grāmo havelyākhyayuk tasyotdhāramatho vi
dhāya bhuvi taṁ gopālapūḥsaṁjñakaṁ . kṛtvā tatra hanūmadīśanilayaṁ ni
mayi vāpīṁ sudhī tatpārśvadvitaye vaṭāmrasurabhīn bodhidrumān kiṁśu
kān . jaṁbūniṁbatarūn latāṁśca vividhāṁstvāropya paṇyāpaṇānā
stīrya dvijataṁtuvāyanilayānvāpīṁstathā nirmame . dugdhānnaiśśita
śarkaraiśca madhurairbhakṣyaistathā sarpiṣāṁ pūraiśśākavaraiśca dakṣiṇayu
taistāṁbūlapaṭṭairdvijān . saṁtarpyāgamasatpurāṇapaṭhaṇe śrīdevapūjā
kṛtau viprāṇāṁ pratihāyanapratidinaṁ vṛttiṁ prakalpyādhunā . śrīdeva
sya mahotsavāya surathāṁstvaiśīṁ tathā vaiṭṭhalīṁ gādhitvā pratimāṁ cakā
ra sarasīṁ tāṁ caṁdrabhāgāsamāṁ . 4 . madvaṁśajā paramahīpati
jāye ye bhūmipāḥ satatamujvaladharmacittāḥ . matdharma
mātraparipālanamācaraṁti tatpādapadmayugalaṁ śira
sā vahāmī . 5 . Iti rāmavacanaṁ śrī sana 12
32 kupaṇīsarakāra bāgaḍakoṭī śubhedāra Appu
rāyana dharma .
Digital edition of SII 15.272 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
